name: @conductor/telemetry
//note: OpenTelemetry tracing is an OPTIONAL integration point: tracing.ts dynamically imports @opentelemetry/{sdk-node,auto-instrumentations-node,exporter-trace-otlp-http} only when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set, failing soft if absent. They are NOT bundled by default because their transitive deps carry CVEs (exporter-prometheus DoS, gaxios/uuid). Add them + an OTel Collector/Tempo to light up distributed traces. See docs/DECISIONS.md.
